{"success":true,"response":"Process J09A has been executed end-to-end:

- Working table `J09A_temp` was created from `decision_talbe` for all tours like `J09A%`.
- Column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was added and populated:
  - Per `HAUS`: `<3` EQUNR rows → `KSA`, otherwise → `EVU`.
  - Override applied: rows with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` set to `EVU`.
- Installation information was derived via `eanl`, then linked to `eablg` to fetch `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`.
- Customer/master data was joined from `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`, with unified fields:
  - If any SALES_* data exists, unified fields (TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, etc.) come from `sales_master`.
  - Otherwise they come from `net_master`.
  - `ME_MA_ID` is taken from the base table (no net/sales ME_MA_ID available in the schema).
- Final dataset was exported to `J09A.csv` with the required columns.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com` with subject/body indicating it is the J09A Meter Readings Export.
- Temporary table `J09A_temp` was dropped.

If you’d like, I can summarize the exact SQL used or the row counts by ENTSCHEIDUNG (KSA vs EVU).","message":"Process agent executed successfully","hit_recursion_limit":false,"hit_timeout":false}

structured_content.response:
Process J09A has been executed end-to-end:

- Working table `J09A_temp` was created from `decision_talbe` for all tours like `J09A%`.
- Column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` was added and populated:
  - Per `HAUS`: `<3` EQUNR rows → `KSA`, otherwise → `EVU`.
  - Override applied: rows with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` set to `EVU`.
- Installation information was derived via `eanl`, then linked to `eablg` to fetch `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`.
- Customer/master data was joined from `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR`, with unified fields:
  - If any SALES_* data exists, unified fields (TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, etc.) come from `sales_master`.
  - Otherwise they come from `net_master`.
  - `ME_MA_ID` is taken from the base table (no net/sales ME_MA_ID available in the schema).
- Final dataset was exported to `J09A.csv` with the required columns.
- The CSV was emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com` with subject/body indicating it is the J09A Meter Readings Export.
- Temporary table `J09A_temp` was dropped.

If you’d like, I can summarize the exact SQL used or the row counts by ENTSCHEIDUNG (KSA vs EVU).

kwargs.content:
Process J09A has been executed successfully end-to-end. Summary of what was done:

- Created working table `J09A_temp` from `decision_talbe` for all tours like `J09A%`.
- Added and populated `ENTSCHEIDUNG`:
  - Per `HAUS`: if `< 3` EQUNR rows → `KSA`, otherwise → `EVU`.
  - Override: rows with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` set to `EVU`.
- Derived installation info via `eanl`, then linked to `eablg` to fetch `"Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."`.
- Joined customer/master data from `net_master` and `sales_master` on `EQUNR` with unified fields:
  - If any `SALES_*` data exists, unified fields (TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, etc.) come from `sales_master`.
  - Otherwise they come from `net_master`.
  - `ME_MA_ID` was taken from the base table.
- Exported final dataset to `J09A.csv` with the required columns.
- Emailed the CSV to `meter.readings@evu.com` with an appropriate subject/body.
- Dropped temporary table `J09A_temp`.

Tell me if you want details like:
- The exact SQL/steps used, or
- Row counts by `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (KSA vs EVU), or
- A check-list/log format you can file as documentation.
